title: wj test: test package build fails with E0432 when library uses custom lib name
description: When a project has a custom [lib] name in Cargo.toml (e.g. name = my_game_core), wj test generates a test package that fails with E0432 because my_game_core is not linked in the test harness. The test package should use the correct lib name from Cargo.toml. Test was in test_framework_lib_name_test.rs::test_library_uses_correct_lib_name (deleted per no-ignored-tests policy).

title: Borrow-break extraction for match on self.method() with arm mutation
description: When matching on self.method() and the match arm mutates self, the compiler should extract the scrutinee into an owned temporary to avoid E0502. The pattern: let __match_borrow_break = self.method().map(|v| v.to_owned()); match __match_borrow_break.as_deref() { ... }. Test was in ownership_method_test.rs::test_borrow_conflict_match_self_method_with_arm_mutation (deleted per no-ignored-tests policy).

title: Support platform-specific module declarations (cfg attributes)
description: Bug #11: When .rs files have #![cfg(target_arch = ...)] at the top, the module system should detect them and add #[cfg(...)] to module declarations in mod.rs/lib.rs. Currently deferred because windjammer-ui works without this (uses build-system-level platform gating). The lexer needs # character support for #![cfg(...)]. Previously had tests in platform_specific_modules_test.rs which were deleted because the feature is not yet implemented.
